name: Modern Living RPG | A Freeform Modern Life RPG Scenario
description:
Modern living, realistic or fantasy. Make your own choices!

PROXY ✅️ ALWAYS

Welcome to Modern Living RPG, a freeform, player-driven scenario generator where you set the tone and shape your own story.

Content Warning: Dead Dove. Freeform scenarios may generate disturbing and violent content. AI be like that.

High-stakes office drama? Relaxed college life? A Mafia boss smuggling GPUs from Canada? The choice is yours.

Decide whether you want a grounded modern setting, a world with light fantasy elements like demi-humans or anthros, or a full-on modern fantasy backdrop with elf bankers and dwarf construction workers.

This bot is designed to be lightweight on tokens, leaving more room for your story to breathe. For the best experience, I highly recommend using the Chat Memory feature to record your starting character and scenario setup, and to log major events or recurring side characters you want remembered.

I deliberately decided not to have systems with trackers for money or other things to keep it light. If this is something you would rather have, please let me know.

Standard bio follows:

If the bot speaks for you, simply reroll, edit or delete the message. The AI wants to write. After a few messages, it should learn to stick to a presented style and hopefully avoid it again. You may also add instructions in (OOC:) or chat memory or advanced prompt to avoid speaking for {{user}} and see if that helps.

My definitions are open and licensed under Creative Commons CC-BY-NC-SA (Attribution, Non-Commercial, Share Alike). You can find the full license definition here: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/

If something isn’t working on a bot or you have suggestions about the bot or tags, etc, feel free to leave a comment or review. I’m always eager to learn and improve. I welcome critical reviews, too - just please keep it respectful.

We’re all people here. Let’s be kind to one another.
creator: toebeansocks
